name: Charter Hall Long Wale Reit
analysis: CLW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$3.7450, stop A$3.3017, target A$5.0750 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
